name: helpdesk-emuci
description: HelpDesk EMUCI — bureau à distance / support technique

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n back,front -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.start:prod: npm run seed --prefix backend && npm run start --prefix backend
